title: My Own Summer (Shove It)
lines: I think God is moving its tongue
Hey you, big mood
The shade is a tool, a device, a savior
Hey you, big star
'Cause I'm through when the two hits the six
(The sun) shove it, shove it, shove it!

title: Whisper My Name
lines: You can't even speak
Ashes to ashes, dust to dust
The dustiest niggas been fuckin' with us
Am I a GOAT? Well, probably not
My white label had to go white label shit
You gotta whisper my name (my name)

title: Jaded
lines: I wanna be around while you chasin' (while you chasin' it)
Dogs on this side, dogs over on this side
Leaving me (leaving me), dippin' out on me (on me)
Already got what you needed, I guess
Still got love for you, mami
Yes, I'm hurting, yes, I'm jaded (jaded)

title: Live Forever
lines: We see things they'll never see
Maybe I don't really wanna know
How your garden grows
Lately, did you ever feel the pain
In the morning rain
You and I are gonna live forever

title: Around the Fur
lines: Should I ignore the fashion or go by the book?
Hey vanity, this vial's empty and so are you
Prostitute, climb back down from the floor
Please don't fuck around and die like this
Speak, I don't get it
Coming back around the fur
